phrases.cultural_note: The palace is open to visitors late July through late August, when the King is on summer vacation. Check the official schedule.

responses.english: Late July to late August, 10:30am to 5pm.
responses.phonetic: duh fan zhwee-YAY ah fan OOT, duh dee zuhr trahnt ah dee-set uhr
responses.french: De fin juillet à fin août, de dix heures trente à dix-sept heures.

phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la salle du trône ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah sal doo trohn
phrases.cultural_note: The Throne Room is the highlight — featuring the royal throne, massive chandeliers, and portraits of Belgian monarchs.

responses.english: On the first floor, in the right wing. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, dahn lel DRWAHT. swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Au premier étage, dans l'aile droite. Suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the palace is free
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the Royal Palace is free during the summer opening period.

responses.english: Yes, entry is free during the summer opening period.
responses.phonetic: wee, lahn-TRAY eh grah-TWEET pahn-DAHN lah pay-ree-OD doo-vair-TOOR ahn ay-TAY
responses.french: Oui, l'entrée est gratuite pendant la période d'ouverture en été.

phrases.cultural_note: The Royal Gardens are free and open year-round. They're a popular spot for locals, especially on sunny weekends.

responses.english: Yes, the gardens are open for free all year.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay zhar-DAN son oo-VAIR grah-tweet-MAHN toot lah-NAY
responses.french: Oui, les jardins sont ouverts gratuitement toute l'année.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the palace is open today
phrases.cultural_note: The palace is only open to visitors during a brief summer period. Check the official schedule.

responses.english: Check the dates on the official website. It's only open in summer.
responses.phonetic: vay-ree-fee-AY lay DAHT soor luh seet oh-fee-SYEL. say oo-VAIR suhl-MAHN ahn ay-TAY
responses.french: Vérifiez les dates sur le site officiel. C'est ouvert seulement en été.
